steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to "emphasize the size" of the sculpture. Specific measurements convey size more effectively than vague adjectives like "large." Note 3 provides the key data: the sculpture is roughly 6 feet wide and 12 feet tall.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Richard Serra is an American artist known for his large metal sculptures.': mentions "large" generically but gives no measurements, so size is not concretely emphasized. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Richard Serra's Rotate is made of weathering steel.': focuses on material, omits size entirely. ✗
  • Choice C — 'American artist Richard Serra creates large sculptures from metals such as weathering steel.': uses the vague adjective "large" with no measurements. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Rotate, a large metal sculpture by artist Richard Serra, stretches roughly 6 feet wide and 12 feet tall.': provides concrete measurements (6 ft wide, 12 ft tall) from the notes, making size vivid and specific. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
